allow: Bash(node -e "const db = require\('better-sqlite3'\)\(':memory:'\); console.log\('SQLite works:', db.prepare\('SELECT 1 as n'\).get\(\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const { Database } = require\('node-sqlite3-wasm'\); const db = new Database\(':memory:'\); console.log\('WASM SQLite works:', db.prepare\('SELECT 1 as n'\).get\(\)\)")
